posts.text:
Episode 14 is live: Building a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline

Maya Chen on the five stages of production—and why the pipeline is the product.

→ https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release

Five checks before you hit publish:
1. Names and affiliations ✓
2. Links and references ✓
3. Sponsor compliance ✓
4. Sensitive edits ✓
5. Metadata consistency ✓

Episode 14 with Maya Chen:
→ https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release

"A transcript is a rich input, not the final source of editorial truth."

Maya Chen in Episode 14. Raw transcripts are useful. Clean transcripts are publishable. The difference matters.

→ https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
